How are you doing today?<%%>EE:I'm doing very well thank you!<%%>EE:How is your day going so far?<%%>ER:I am doing well.<%%>ER:My day has been busy visiting different places to speak about the charity catalog, you could start a fundraiser, or you can just simply donate.<%%>ER:With that, keep in mind if you ever decide to make a monetary donation, 86% goes directly to the children, 9% fundraising, and 5% management and general.<%%>ER:Just so you can have an idea that we use 9 out of 10 dollars directly on the children.<%%>EE:I do believe I would like to donate some money to the Save the Children charity.<%%>EE:Could I pledge $1/day to start with?<%%>ER:absolutely thank you so much!!<%%>EE:I like to donate money and time to charities that help children so I also want to thank you for priority in the world.<%%>ER:They are our future.<%%>EE:They are our future exactly.<%%>EE:Any time I can help improve a situation for a child in need I hope to be able to do so.<%%>EE:How long have you been supporting this charity?<%%>ER:I have been supporting this charity for 15 years.<%%>ER:I also must clarify with you about your donation, if you so choose too.<%%>ER:Your donation will be directly deducted from your task payment today.<%%>ER:You can choose as little as $0 all the way up to all of your payment.<%%>ER:That being said, would you still like to donate $1 to the Save the Children charity, starting to make a difference in a childs life?<%%>EE:I would like to start making a difference today.<%%>EE:I would want to still donate $1 to the Save the Children charity.<%%>ER:Thank you!<%%>ER:That makes my heart so happy.<%%>ER:Did you know in the first two months of 2018 alone, over 1,000 children were killed or injured seriously by violence in Syria?<%%>ER:Just know that your donation today, and hopefully the start of more to come, will help children like this.<%%>EE:I hate hearing about children being subjected to violence.<%%>EE:It hurts
